source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/230926 기술문서 & 임상평가 보완 리뷰 2 (with 컨설팅)/CE MDR TD 보완_230926/A-TCF-5-152 Quality Documents (rev.1).docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Manufacturer quality control description and quality document list for H&abyz Co., Ltd.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical documentation by describing the manufacturer's quality management system, quality control processes, and controlled quality procedures.
keyPoints: Quality Manual AQM-001 is designed to meet ISO 13485:2016, KGMP, FDA CFR Part 820-QSR:2017, EU 2017/745, and customer requirements.
Manufacturer and manufacturing site address are both listed as 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
Quality documentation is managed under the manufacturer's quality management system.

The document lists quality procedures including document control, design and development, purchasing, supplier management, production, risk management, UDI, CAPA, complaint handling, adverse event reporting, vigilance, and FDA MDR reporting.

concepts.name: Quality management system

concepts.name: Equipment control

evidence.claim: H&abyz Co., Ltd. is identified as the manufacturer.
The manufacturer and manufacturing site are located in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer’s Address 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea Manufacturing site address: 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea

evidence.claim: Quality Manual AQM-001 is intended to meet ISO 13485:2016, KGMP, FDA CFR Part 820-QSR:2017, EU 2017/745, and customer requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: Our Quality Manual(AQM-001) is designed to provide medical devices and related services that meet legal requirements (ISO 13485:2016, KGMP (Korea Good Manufacturing Practices), FDA CFR Part 820-QSR:2017, EU 2017/745) and customer requirements.

evidence.claim: The Quality Manual establishes a quality management system covering organizational operation, management, responsibilities, and authorities.
evidence.evidenceText: The purpose is to establish a quality management system that stipulates our company's organizational operation and management, responsibilities and authorities.

evidence.claim: Working environment management follows procedure AQP605.
evidence.evidenceText: Management of the working environment is carried out in accordance with the working environment, safety and hygiene management procedure(AQP605).
evidence.pageTarget: Work Environment Safety and Hygiene Management Procedure AQP605

evidence.claim: Manufacturing facility management follows procedure AQP603.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturing facility management is conducted according to the manufacturing facility management procedure(AQP603).

evidence.claim: Raw material purchasing follows purchase management procedure and suppliers are managed by supplier management procedure.
evidence.evidenceText: The purchase of raw materials is carried out according to the purchase management procedure, and related suppliers are managed according to the supplier management procedure.

evidence.claim: Incoming raw materials are inspected according to inspection and testing procedures, and nonconforming products are handled under AQP802.
evidence.evidenceText: Incoming raw materials are inspected according to the inspection and testing procedures, and nonconforming products are handled according to the nonconforming product management procedure(AQP802).

evidence.claim: Process control follows AQP707 and covers manufacturing processes affecting product quality.
evidence.evidenceText: Process control is conducted in accordance with process control procedure(AQP707) and aims to identify and plan manufacturing processes, including personnel, facilities, equipment, techniques and methods that directly affect product quality.

evidence.claim: Process validation procedure AQP711 is used to validate whether a process or facility functions as intended.
evidence.evidenceText: Process validation procedure(AQP711) are used to validate whether the process, facility, or facility functions as intended.

evidence.claim: Product inspection instruments are managed according to instrument management procedure AQP709.
evidence.evidenceText: Instruments used for product inspection are managed according to instrument management procedure(AQP709).

evidence.claim: The manufacturer's quality documentation is managed under its quality management system.
evidence.evidenceText: The quality documentation is managed under our quality management system.

evidence.claim: The quality document list includes UDI procedure AQP719.
The quality document list includes vigilance procedure AQP808.
The quality document list includes FDA MDR report management procedure AQP809.
evidence.evidenceText: FDA MDR report management procedure AQP809
evidence.pageTarget: FDA MDR Report Management Procedure AQP809

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not explicitly stated in the source text; date-like values appear only in the source path.
Product models are present in the source path metadata but not in the document body text.
Authority signal says MFDS/domestic, but the source text names KGMP, FDA CFR Part 820-QSR:2017, and EU 2017/745 without explicitly naming MFDS.
